name: Media Output
description: Validate and inventory media URLs from pipeline data. Detects logos and OG image candidates.

options.name: validate_urls
options.label: Validate URLs
options.description: Send HEAD requests to check each URL is accessible.

options.name: find_logo
options.label: Find company logo
options.description: Attempt to find logo URLs from source citations (common patterns: /logo, /brand, favicon).

options.name: find_og_image
options.label: Find OG image candidates
options.description: Identify potential Open Graph image URLs from media inventory.

options.name: max_urls_per_entity
options.label: Max URLs per entity
options.description: Maximum number of media URLs to process per entity.
